commands.name: add
commands.description:
Add a completed time entry with specified start and end 
times

commands.name: add-task-from-jira

options.name: --issue
options.description:
Single Jira issue key or URL to add (optional, cannot be 
used with --jql)

options.name: --jql
options.description:
JQL query to find multiple Jira issues (optional, cannot be
used with --issue)

options.name: --project
options.description:
Project name to add tasks to (optional, will prompt if not 
provided)

commands.description:
Add tasks from Jira to a Clockify project (interactive or via 
parameters)
examples: add-task-from-jira -p MyProject -j project = PROJ AND status = 'In Progress'

commands.name: add-project

options.name: --name
options.description:
Project name (optional, will prompt if not 
provided)

commands.description:
Add a new project to Clockify (interactive or via 
parameter)

commands.name: archive-tasks-for-completed-jiras
commands.description: Archive Tasks For Completed Jiras

commands.name: update-task-names-for-jiras
commands.description: Sync Clockify task names with current Jira data

commands.name: breaks-report

options.name: --days
options.description: Number of days to look back for breaks

options.name: --detailed
options.description: Show detailed view with start/end times

options.name: --include-current
options.description:
Include the currently running break entry in the 
view

options.name: --week-start
options.description: First day of the week (Sunday, Monday, etc.)

commands.description: Display breaks and break-type time entries

commands.name: config
commands.description: Configuration management commands

commands.name: set
commands.description:
Set API keys, credentials, and recent tasks options (required
first step). Includes: Clockify API Key, Jira Username, Jira API Token, Tempo 
API Key, Recent Tasks Count, Recent Tasks Days.

commands.name: view
commands.description: View current configuration

commands.name: schedule-monitor

options.name: --interval
options.description:
Interval in minutes for the scheduled task (15, 30, 60, 
120, 240)

options.name: --remove
options.description:
Remove/delete the scheduled task instead of creating 
it

commands.description: Set up scheduled task for timer monitoring

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete completed timers from this week

commands.name: discard
commands.description:
Discard the currently running timer (permanently deletes 
it)

commands.name: edit

options.name: --days
options.description: Number of days back to look for time entries

commands.description: Edit start/end times of existing time entries

commands.name: full-view
commands.description: Open Clockify web app in your default browser

commands.name: start
commands.description:
Start a new time entry by selecting from available 
tasks

commands.name: status
commands.description:
Display current in-progress time entry from 
Clockify

commands.name: show-changelog

options.name: --version
options.description:
Specific version to show changelog for (e.g., 1.11). If not
specified, shows interactive version selection.

commands.description: Display the changelog for the current version

commands.name: stop

options.name: --force
options.description:
Skip confirmation prompt and stop timer 
immediately

commands.description: Stop the currently running time entry in Clockify

commands.name: timer-monitor

options.name: --always-notify
options.description:
Show notification even when timer is running (for status 
updates)

options.name: --silent
options.description:
Silent mode - suppress console output (useful for scheduled
tasks)

commands.description:
Monitor timer status and show notifications (ideal for 
scheduled tasks)

commands.name: upload-to-tempo

options.name: --cleanup-orphaned
options.description:
Clean up orphaned entries without Clockify IDs (use with 
caution)

options.name: --days
options.description: Number of days to upload time entries for

commands.description: Upload time entries from Clockify to Tempo

commands.name: week-view

options.name: --detailed
options.description:
Show detailed view with start time, end time, and duration 
for each entry

options.name: --include-current
options.description:
Include the currently running time entry in the 
view

options.name: --week-start
options.description:
Day of the week to start the week view (Monday, Tuesday, 
Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday)

commands.description: Display current week's time entries from Clockify
